title: Change Tab Artifacts
description: Studio UI for **Change Tab Artifacts**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Artifacts**.
context: Studio UI for **Change Tab Artifacts**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Artifacts**.

rules.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
rules:
While the Artifacts tab is visible for an **active** change, the view MUST load the artifact list via `listChangeArtifacts(name)` (not only `getChangeStatus` short-circuit). For a **drafted** change it MUST use `listDraftArtifacts(name)`; for **discarded** it MUST use `listDiscardedArtifacts(name)`. The UI MUST use the shadcn **`Accordion`** component (with `type="multiple"`) to group artifacts into two top-level **scope** sections, in order: **Change**, then **Spec**.

**Change scope:** files whose paths are not under `specs/` or `deltas/` (e.g. `proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`). Within Change, group by artifact type (`proposal`, `design`, `tasks`, …). Each artifact type appears **once**, ordered by the schema artifact DAG topological order (`proposal` → `specs` → `verify` → `design` → `tasks`, change-scoped types only). Files within a type sort ascending by full path.

**Spec scope:** files under `specs/` or `deltas/` (any artifact type). Group by `specId` (`workspace:capability-path`) using [`ui:design-system`](../design-system/spec.md) ascending order. Within each spec, list all artifact files for that spec together (specs, verify, deltas, etc.): if a `spec.md` exists among those paths it MUST be first; remaining files sort ascending by full path. Artifact rows MUST be implemented using shadcn **`Button`** components for consistent interaction.

Tab-scoped poll MUST adopt global ticks only while the tab is visible. For **archived** changes, the tab MUST render the archived snapshot `artifacts[]` metadata from `getArchivedChange` without calling `listChangeArtifacts`, preserving the same grouped **Change** / **Spec** layout as active changes wherever the archived snapshot contains those files.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: artifacts tab exposes validate all for active changes
rules: For **active** (non-archived) changes, the Artifacts tab MUST render a **Validate All** control (`data-testid="studio-validate-all"`) in a tab toolbar above the artifact accordion. Clicking it MUST delegate to shell validate flow ([`ui:validate-confirm-dialog`](../validate-confirm-dialog/spec.md)). Archived changes MUST NOT show this control.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Unchanged status skips tab refetch
then: tab does not refetch heavy views
AND spinner stops without data swap

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Advanced updatedAt refetches tab data
then: only this tab data sources reload
AND other tabs are unaffected

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Hidden tab pauses polling
given: change tab was visible then hidden
then: no tab-scoped artifact list request is sent
AND cache is retained until visible again

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Artifacts tab uses listChangeArtifacts endpoint
then: UI calls listChangeArtifacts
AND renders grouped files even when status returns unchanged: true

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Drafted change uses listDraftArtifacts
given: drafted change open with listSection draft
then: UI calls listDraftArtifacts
AND does not call listChangeArtifacts

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Discarded change uses listDiscardedArtifacts
given: discarded change open with listSection discarded
then: UI calls listDiscardedArtifacts

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Tasks tab skips fetch when tasks artifact is missing
given: status shows tasks artifact as missing
when: user opens Tasks tab for a drafted change
then: UI does not call getChange for tasks.md
AND shows a missing-tasks message instead of Change '<name>' not found

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Artifacts grouped by scope change then spec
given: active change with proposal.md and at least one specs/.../spec.md
then: UI shows a Change section before a Spec section
AND proposal.md appears under Change grouped by artifact type
AND spec paths appear under Spec grouped by specId

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Change scope types follow DAG order without duplicates
given: active change with proposal.md, design.md, and tasks.md
then: Change section lists artifact types in order proposal, design, tasks
AND each type appears at most once

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Spec scope lists spec.md first within a spec
given: active change with specs/ui/foo/spec.md and specs/ui/foo/verify.md
when: user opens the Artifacts tab under Spec for ui:foo
then: spec.md is listed before verify.md

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches status (artifact DAG) when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Archived artifacts tab shows snapshot artifact files
then: UI lists archived snapshot artifact files grouped in the standard layout
AND does not call listChangeArtifacts

scenarios.requirement: artifacts tab exposes validate all for active changes
scenarios.name: Active change shows Validate All on Artifacts tab
then: data-testid="studio-artifacts-tab" is visible
AND data-testid="studio-validate-all" is visible in the tab toolbar

scenarios.requirement: artifacts tab exposes validate all for active changes
scenarios.name: Archived change hides Validate All
then: no studio-validate-all control is rendered

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected
then: @specd/ui does not import @specd/core
AND components call client:port-* hooks

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: calls go through SpecdDataPort
AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: lint or build fails
AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: consumers receive an error object
AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: UI shows the conflict message
AND editor buffer is not silently replaced
